title: Simple Heart Crosshair
description: Simply replaces your crosshair with a heart <3
body:
## Intro
Hiii feel free to do whatever you want with this its literally just a crosshair replacer. I switch hud pretty frequently and ik I might be lazy for this but switching the crosshair was getting annoying. 

## Versions
Oldest supported version : 1.20.2

Should work with the most recent version.

## Q&A : 
Q: I get a warning saying its not supported!!

A: Its because the pack format is for 1.21.4, it'll work as long as you got seperated hud elements supported wich was introduced in 1.20.2.
